svg.title: Fluid Translation workflow from file import to client delivery
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing 8 stages: file import into MemoQ, pre-translation and TM/TB lookup, translation, QA tool check, review/editing, project manager review, final delivery packaging, and client delivery.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how files are imported into MemoQ at Fluid Translation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the pre-translation and TM/TB lookup step at Fluid Translation')
g.text: TM matches + IFRS/ESRS term base lookup

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the translation stage at Fluid Translation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the QA and Decision Support tool at Fluid Translation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the revision and editing step at Fluid Translation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the project manager review step at Fluid Translation')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about how final files are packaged for delivery at Fluid Translation')
g.text: Export from MemoQ, final file prep

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how Fluid Translation delivers files to clients')
g.text: Files sent, invoice issued via Projetex
